# Systemic CRM — Full Documentation for AI Models

> Systemic is a comprehensive cloud-based CRM system built for small and medium businesses in Ukraine. All-in-one platform: clients, appointments, sales, inventory, finances, communications.

## Company Overview

**Name**: Systemic
**Type**: B2B SaaS (Software as a Service)
**Market**: Ukraine (primary), international (English support)
**Founded**: 2026
**Contact**: support@systemic-crm.com

## Problem We Solve

Small and medium businesses (especially in the service industry) struggle with:
1. Client data scattered across notebooks, messengers, and Excel spreadsheets
2. No unified view of finances — real profit is unknown
3. Inventory management is manual and error-prone
4. Hours wasted on routine: manual scheduling, paper invoices, memory-based reminders
5. No integration between booking, sales, inventory, and financial reporting

## Solution

Systemic replaces 10+ separate tools with one integrated system:
- Replaces paper notebooks → Digital client cards with full history
- Replaces Excel → Automated financial reports and P&L
- Replaces manual inventory tracking → Real-time stock management
- Replaces separate booking apps → Built-in appointment calendar
- Replaces disconnected messengers → Telegram bot integration
- Replaces manual payroll → Automatic salary calculation

## Detailed Feature List

### 1. Client Database
- Client cards with all contact information
- Visit history with dates, services, and revenue
- Purchase history
- Birthday tracking (day/month/year)
- Custom categories and tags
- Advanced search and filtering
- Bulk operations

### 2. Appointment Calendar
- Visual drag-and-drop interface
- Daily, weekly views
- Multiple services per appointment
- Staff-based filtering (each master sees own schedule)
- Recurring/batch appointments
- Color-coded by service type
- Automatic duration calculation

### 3. Sales & Orders
- Full order lifecycle management
- Status tracking: new → confirmed → packed → shipped → delivered
- Nova Poshta integration:
  - Automatic waybill (TTN) creation
  - Real-time delivery tracking
  - Warehouse lookup
- Automatic inventory deduction on sale
- Material sales with markup

### 4. Inventory Management
- Product catalog with categories
- Real-time stock levels
- Purchase orders and receiving
- Automatic write-off on sales/services
- Stock movement history
- Low stock alerts
- Multi-location inventory

### 5. Financial Module
- Transaction tracking (income/expense)
- Cash register management
- Shift open/close with reconciliation
- Profit & Loss reports
- Revenue by period, staff, service
- Expense categories
- Real-time financial dashboard

### 6. Telegram Bot
- Two-way messaging with clients
- Automatic appointment reminders (configurable timing)
- Client replies visible in CRM
- Message history per client
- Unread message counter
- No app installation needed for clients

### 7. Payroll & Motivation
- Flexible compensation models:
  - Percentage of service revenue
  - Fixed salary
  - Per-appointment rate
  - Bonus system
- Automatic calculation based on completed work
- Pay period reports
- Individual staff performance tracking

### 8. Fiscal Receipts (Checkbox)
- Integration with Ukrainian PRRO (Checkbox)
- Fiscal receipt generation per transaction
- Full compliance with Ukrainian tax law
- Receipt history

### 9. Staff Management
- Employee profiles with roles
- Work schedules
- Permission system (27+ granular permissions)
- Roles: Owner, Admin, Manager, Master
- Per-staff calendar filtering

### 10. Multi-location Support
- Multiple business locations
- Per-location staff, inventory, and scheduling
- Cross-location reporting
- Location-based data filtering

### 11. Dashboard & Analytics
- Daily revenue overview
- Appointment count and completion rate
- Top services and products
- Staff performance metrics
- Birthday reminders
- Upcoming appointments widget

## Pricing Details

### Starter Plan — Free Forever
- 1 business location
- Up to 2 staff members
- Appointment calendar
- Client database
- Basic financial tracking
- Email support

### Business Plan — 499 UAH/month (~$12 USD)
- Up to 5 locations
- Unlimited staff members
- All features included:
  - Inventory management
  - Order management
  - Nova Poshta integration
  - Telegram bot & reminders
  - Advanced financial reports
  - Payroll calculation
- Priority support

### Enterprise Plan — Custom Pricing
- Unlimited locations and staff
- API access for custom integrations
- Dedicated account manager
- SLA and uptime guarantees
- Custom feature development
- Onboarding assistance

## Technical Architecture

- **Frontend**: React 18 Single Page Application
- **Backend**: Vercel Serverless Functions (Node.js)
- **Database**: Google Firebase Firestore (NoSQL)
- **Authentication**: Firebase Authentication
- **Hosting**: Vercel (auto-deploy from Git)
- **Multi-tenant**: Subcollection-based isolation (tenants/{id}/...)

### Integrations
- **Telegram Bot API** — client messaging and reminders
- **Nova Poshta API** — delivery and waybill management
- **Checkbox API** — fiscal receipt generation
- **Turbo SMS API** — SMS notifications

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do I need to install any software?**
A: No. Systemic works entirely in the browser — on desktop, tablet, and phone.

**Q: Is there a free plan?**
A: Yes, the Starter plan is free forever. It includes 1 location, up to 2 staff, calendar, and client base.

**Q: Can I migrate data from another system?**
A: Yes, we help migrate data from Excel or another CRM. Contact our support team.

**Q: Does it work on mobile?**
A: Yes, the responsive interface works on any device with a browser.

**Q: Is there fiscal receipt integration?**
A: Yes, integration with Checkbox for creating compliant fiscal receipts per Ukrainian law.

**Q: How many staff members can I add?**
A: Free plan: up to 2. Paid plans: unlimited.

**Q: What industries is Systemic best for?**
A: Beauty salons, barbershops, fitness studios, medical clinics, dental offices, and any service business that needs appointment scheduling + client management + financial tracking.

**Q: Is my data secure?**
A: Yes. All data is stored in Google Firebase with encryption at rest and in transit. Each tenant's data is isolated in separate subcollections.

## Comparison with Alternatives

| Feature | Systemic | Generic CRMs | Paper/Excel |
|---------|----------|--------------|-------------|
| Client database | Yes | Yes | Manual |
| Appointment calendar | Built-in | Plugin needed | No |
| Inventory | Built-in | Plugin needed | Manual |
| Financial reports | Real-time | Basic | Manual |
| Telegram bot | Built-in | No | No |
| Nova Poshta integration | Built-in | No | No |
| Fiscal receipts (UA) | Built-in | No | No |
| Ukrainian language | Native | Translation | N/A |
| Free plan | Yes | Limited | Free |
| Setup time | 5 minutes | Hours/days | N/A |
